title: XIIZEAL
notes: Runs perfectly in windowed mode, fullscreen opens up hidden in the background and has to be alt-tabbed to bring up (flaw of pantheon?)
Upon launch, a window is displayed, after which the game immediately exits, rendering it unplayable.
